# GEN — API Reference for AI Agents

> GEN is an Autonomous Social Media Agent platform. It detects trends, generates video content, publishes across platforms, and improves automatically.

Two surfaces: **Agent Core** (`api.gen.pro/v1/agents/{id}/core` + `/voice`) for setting up an agent's brand, personality, inspiration sources, and voice; and **Auto Content Engine** (`api.gen.pro/v1/autocontentengine/*`) for producing videos from those agents. Both authenticate with an X-API-Key PAT.

For any new agent, **start with Agent Core**. Generating content before the agent is configured gives you generic results; configuring it first means every downstream feature (content ideas, template fills, voice) speaks in the agent's voice from the first call.

## About GEN

GEN is structured as: Workspace → Agent → Auto Content Engine → Content Loop

- **Workspace**: Top-level container for a company or brand
- **Agent**: A brand identity with voice, personality, and strategy. All API calls are scoped to an agent.
- **Auto Content Engine (ACE)**: A spreadsheet-like workspace with columns (content types), rows (one per video), and cells (individual pieces of content). Think of it as a video production line.
- **Content Loop**: Spot trends → Generate content → Deploy to social → Measure performance → Adapt → Repeat

## Authentication

Base URL: https://api.gen.pro/v1
Auth: `X-API-Key: <your-api-key>` header

Get an API key:
1. Log in at https://gen.pro
2. Go to Settings → API Keys
3. Click "Create API Key" — copy the token immediately (shown once)

Or create via API: POST /v1/persisted_tokens

## Quick Start

The GEN workflow has two halves — configure the agent, then let it generate content. Get the configuration right and the rest takes care of itself.

### Step 1: Configure the Agent Core (most important step for any new agent)

One flat PATCH writes every field the GEN Setup canvas can save: brand, inspiration sources, personality, voice. Every field name maps 1:1 to how the FE saves it. This is what every downstream feature (content ideas, template fills, voice generation) reads from. A blank agent produces generic ideas. A richly configured agent produces specific, on-brand ones.

PATCH /v1/agents/{agent_id}/core
```json
{
  "brand_name": "Santiago",
  "description": "San Antonio street food scout who hunts the best tacos.",
  "identity_type": "character",
  "goal": "growth",
  "target_platforms": ["tiktok", "instagram"],
  "shortform": true,
  "longform": false,
  "keywords": ["streetfood", "foodtruck", "tacotok"],
  "monitored": [
    { "handle": "https://tiktok.com/@keithlee", "item_type": "account" },
    { "handle": "sanantonioeats", "item_type": "hashtag" }
  ],
  "linked_accounts": [
    { "url": "https://tiktok.com/@santiago_sa", "platform": "tiktok" }
  ],
  "personality": "Santiago grew up eating at his tia's taco stand in south San Antonio. 28, easy-going, trusts his tongue over reviews.",
  "look": "Warm earthy tones, close-up food shots, natural light",
  "content_themes": ["street food", "local spots", "food reviews"],
  "persona_inspirations": ["@keilapacheco", "@thetacochronicles"],
  "timezone": "America/Chicago",
  "default_user_voice": { "voice_id": "21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM", "source": "public" }
}
```
Returns 200 with the full updated agent core object. Upstream Rails failures (timezone, voice, ElevenLabs key) are logged but don't affect the HTTP status — local fields save first.

**Field distinctions:**
- `linked_accounts` = the agent's OWN brand socials (what it posts from). `monitored` = inspiration sources (creators/hashtags to watch).
- `description` is a short 2-3 sentence summary (max 500 chars); full persona text goes in `personality` (max 20000 chars).
- `content_themes` = content pillars (e.g. "street food", "travel"). `persona_inspirations` = creator accounts whose style to emulate.
- `look` = visual style description for reference image generation (max 2000 chars).
- `timezone` + `eleven_lab_api_key` = Rails-owned fields forwarded automatically; they appear in GET responses alongside the local brand fields.

### Step 2: Generate content ideas

Let the agent propose videos grounded in real trending data (10+ platforms). Ideas reference the agent's keywords, inspiration, and personality from step 1.

POST https://agent.gen.pro/v1/agent/run
```json
{ "agent_id": "...", "message": "Generate 5 content ideas grounded in this weeks trends" }
```
Returns `{run_id, conversation_id}`. Poll `GET /runs/{run_id}` until completed, then read ideas from `GET /conversations/{conversation_id}`.

### Step 3: Produce a video from an idea

Clone a template matching the idea's video type, drop the idea's script into cells, generate, render.

1. POST /v1/templates/spreadsheets/{slug}/clone → new engine pre-configured for the video type
2. PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}?agent_id={id} → drop script into cells
3. POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/generate?agent_id={id} → AI fills in the cell
4. GET /v1/generations/{generation_id} → poll until completed
5. POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/render?agent_id={id} → composite final video

## Templates

Templates are pre-configured engines with the right columns already set up. Always check templates first.

GET /v1/templates/projects — list all templates
GET /v1/templates/projects/{slug} — get template details
POST /v1/templates/spreadsheets/{slug}/clone — clone into your agent

Default template columns: TEXT 1, TEXT 2, PROMPT (ingredient columns), VIDEO, FINAL VIDEO, STATS

## Content Generation Types

### Text
generation_type: "text"
data: {prompt, model: "gemini_2_0_flash" | "gemini_2_5_pro" | "gpt_4o" | "gpt_4o_mini" | "o3_mini" | "o4_mini" | "claude_sonnet_4"}

### Image from Text
generation_type: "image_from_text"
data: {prompt, model: "gemini_image" | "gemini_pro_image" | "midjourney", aspect_ratio: "1:1" | "9:16" | "16:9" | "4:3" | "3:4"}

### Video from Text
generation_type: "video_from_text"
data: {prompt, model: "veo_3" | "veo_3_fast" | "veo_3_1" | "veo_3_1_fast" | "sora_2" | "kling_1_6" | "seedance_pro" | "seedance_pro_1_5", aspect_ratio: "1:1" | "9:16" | "16:9", duration: 5 | 10, negative_prompt?}

### Video from Image
generation_type: "video_from_image"
data: {prompt, model: "kling_2_1" | "kling_2_6" | "veo_3" | "veo_3_1" | "sora_2" | "seedance_lite" | "seedance_pro" | "seedance_pro_1_5", image_resource_id, image_tail_resource_id?, aspect_ratio, duration}

### Video from Ingredients
generation_type: "video_from_ingredients"
data: {prompt, model: "pika" | "kling_1_6" | "seedance_lite" | "veo_3_1" | "veo_3_1_fast", asset_resource_ids: [], aspect_ratio, duration}

### Speech from Text
generation_type: "speech_from_text"
data: {script, voice_method: "my_voices" | "design_voice" | "clone_voice", voice_id?, language?, gender?, enhance_voice?, speed?}

### Lipsync
generation_type: "lipsync"
data: {model: "sync_so" | "gen", video_resource_id, audio_resource_id}

### Captions
generation_type: "captions"
data: {model: "gemini", source_resource_id}

### Media (Direct Upload)
generation_type: "media"
data: {content_resource_id}

### Render Final Video
generation_type: "render"
POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/render?agent_id={id}
Composites all layers into a final video in the final_video column.

Legacy type names (still accepted): text_generation, gemini_image_generation, midjourney, gemini_video_generation, sora2_video_generation, kling, kling_image_video, seedance_video_generation, eleven_labs

## Generation Status Flow

pending → processing → completed | failed | stopped

Poll GET /v1/generations/{id} until status is "completed".
On completion: text in "result" field, media URLs in "output_resources" array.
output_resources: [{id, url, thumbnail_url, object_type}]
Credits are pre-charged; refunded on failure/stop.
POST /v1/generations/{id}/stop — stop and refund credits
POST /v1/generations/{id}/continue — resume and re-charge credits

## Common Workflows

### Create a TikTok Video
1. Clone a video template
2. Fill ingredient cells (script, prompt)
3. Generate video in the video column
4. Generate speech from script
5. Lipsync speech to video
6. Render final composed video

### Generate Batch Images
1. Create engine with an image column
2. Add rows (one per image)
3. Generate content in each cell with different prompts

### Add Voiceover to Existing Video
1. Upload video as content resource
2. Generate speech (eleven_labs) from script
3. Lipsync the speech to the video

### Upload Large Files
1. POST /v1/direct_upload with {blob: {filename, byte_size, checksum, content_type}}
2. PUT the file to the returned direct_upload.url with the returned headers
3. Use the signed_id as content_resource[file] in POST /v1/content_resources
Checksum: base64-encoded MD5 (openssl md5 -binary file | base64)
Max size: 1 GB

### Monitor Social Media Content
1. POST /v1/user_jobs?agent_id={id} — start monitoring (multipart form: user_job[user_job_type]=train_social, user_job[data] as JSON string)
2. Supported platforms: tiktok, instagram, youtube
3. Search types: username (@creator), hashtag (#topic), keyword (plain text) — not all combos supported
4. Set monitoring=true for ongoing scraping, false for one-time
5. Poll GET /v1/user_jobs/{id}?agent_id={id} for status
6. Query scraped data via POST /v1/agent_chats (ask natural language questions about the data)

### Publish Content to Social Media
1. POST /v1/user_jobs?agent_id={id} with user_job_type=publish_content
2. data: {platform: "tiktok", media_url: "https://...", description: "caption #hashtags", schedule_type: "now" | "scheduled", scheduled_time: "2026-03-16T15:00:00Z", media_type: "VIDEO"}
3. Poll GET /v1/user_jobs/{id}?agent_id={id} for status

## Column Types

text — Text content (scripts, prompts, notes)
image — Image content
video — Video content
audio — Audio content

Column roles: ingredient (user-creatable), video, final_video, stats (system-managed)

## Endpoints

### Discovery
- GET /v1/me — current user info
- GET /v1/workspaces — list workspaces
- GET /v1/agents?workspace_id={id} — list agents in workspace

### Templates
- GET /v1/templates/projects — list all templates
- GET /v1/templates/projects/{slug} — get template details
- POST /v1/templates/spreadsheets/{slug}/clone — clone template into agent

### Auto Content Engine
- POST /v1/autocontentengine?agent_id={id} — create engine
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}?agent_id={id} — get engine with all data
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/clone?agent_id={id} — clone engine

### Rows
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows?agent_id={id} — list rows
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows?agent_id={id} — create row
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows/{row_id}?agent_id={id} — get row
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows/{row_id}/duplicate?agent_id={id} — duplicate row
- PUT /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows/update_positions?agent_id={id} — reorder rows
- PUT /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/rows/mass_update?agent_id={id} — bulk update rows

### Columns
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns?agent_id={id} — list columns
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns?agent_id={id} — create column
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns/{col_id}/duplicate?agent_id={id} — duplicate column
- PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns/update_positions?agent_id={id} — reorder columns
- PUT /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/columns/mass_update?agent_id={id} — bulk update columns

### Cells
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}?agent_id={id} — get cell
- PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}?agent_id={id} — update cell value
- PUT /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/mass_update?agent_id={id} — bulk update cells
- PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/set_default_user_job?agent_id={id} — set default generation config

### Layers
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers?agent_id={id} — create layer
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers/{layer_id}?agent_id={id} — get layer
- PATCH /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers/{layer_id}?agent_id={id} — update layer
- DELETE /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers/{layer_id}?agent_id={id} — delete layer
- POST .../layers/{layer_id}/duplicate?agent_id={id} — duplicate layer
- PUT .../layers/update_positions?agent_id={id} — reorder layers

### Generations
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/generate?agent_id={id} — generate content in cell
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/cells/{cell_id}/layers/{layer_id}/generate?agent_id={id} — generate content in layer
- GET /v1/generations/{id} — check generation status
- POST /v1/generations/{id}/stop — stop generation (credits refunded)
- POST /v1/generations/{id}/continue — resume generation (credits re-charged)

### Variables
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/global_variables?agent_id={id} — get global variables
- POST /v1/autocontentengine/{id}/import_global_variables?agent_id={id} — import from XLSX
- GET /v1/autocontentengine/global_variables_template — download XLSX template

### Content Resources
- GET /v1/content_resources?agent_id={id}&type={image|video|audio}&page={page} — list resources (20 per page, page starts at 0)
- POST /v1/content_resources?agent_id={id} — upload file (multipart)
- GET /v1/content_resources/{id}?agent_id={id} — get resource details
- PATCH /v1/content_resources/{id}?agent_id={id} — rename resource
- DELETE /v1/content_resources/{id}?agent_id={id} — delete resource

### Asset Library
- GET /v1/asset_libraries?agent_id={id}&folder_id={id}&asset_type={image,video,audio,folder}&search={query} — browse files and folders
- POST /v1/asset_folders?agent_id={id} — create folder
- PATCH /v1/asset_folders/{id}?agent_id={id} — rename folder
- DELETE /v1/asset_folders/{id}?agent_id={id} — delete folder and all contents
- POST /v1/direct_upload — get pre-signed S3 URL for large uploads

### Agents
- POST /v1/agents — create agent
- GET /v1/agents/{id} — get agent details
- PATCH /v1/agents/{id} — update agent
- DELETE /v1/agents/{id} — delete agent
- GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/avatars — list avatars (cursor pagination, 20 per page)
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/avatars — upload avatar (JPEG/PNG/WebP)
- PATCH /v1/agents/{agent_id}/avatars/{id} — set avatar as primary
- DELETE /v1/agents/{agent_id}/avatars/{id} — delete avatar (multiple IDs: 7_8_9)

### Organizations
- GET /v1/organizations — list organizations
- POST /v1/organizations — create organization
- GET /v1/organizations/{id} — get organization (includes credit balance)
- PATCH /v1/organizations/{id} — update organization
- DELETE /v1/organizations/{id} — delete organization (owner only, irreversible)

### API Keys
- POST /v1/persisted_tokens — create API key (token shown once)
- GET /v1/persisted_tokens — list API keys
- PATCH /v1/persisted_tokens/{id} — rename API key
- DELETE /v1/persisted_tokens/{id}/revoke — revoke API key
- DELETE /v1/persisted_tokens/revoke_all — revoke all API keys

### Automation
- GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config — get webhook/callback config
- PATCH /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config — update webhook/callback config
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config/test_webhook — test webhook
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/automation_config/test_callback — test callback

### Content Monitoring
- POST /v1/user_jobs?agent_id={id} — create monitoring job (multipart: user_job[user_job_type]=train_social, user_job[data] JSON string)
- PUT /v1/user_jobs/{id}?agent_id={id} — update monitoring job (flat params: platform, type, value, days, max_results, monitoring, comment_monitoring)

### Publishing
- POST /v1/user_jobs?agent_id={id} — publish content (body: {user_job_type: "publish_content", data: JSON string})

### Agent Core (GEN-2755, recommended for agent setup)
Flat one-call read/write for the entire agent setup canvas. Field names mirror what the FE saves — no sections, no wrappers. Prefer this over per-resource TrendPulse calls.

- GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/core — read all fields in one call
- PATCH /v1/agents/{agent_id}/core — write any subset; 200 on full success, 207 Multi-Status on partial failure

Fields:
- brand_name, description, identity_type ("brand" | "character"), goal, target_platforms, shortform, longform, onboarding_status
- keywords (flat list of strings)
- monitored (list of {handle, item_type: "account"|"hashtag"|"keyword"}) — inspiration sources
- research_topics (list of {topic: string}, max 20 items, each max 500 chars) — subjects the agent stays current on (labeled "Expertise" in UI). Platform researches daily and feeds results into content ideas. Leave empty for evergreen niches.
- linked_accounts (list of {id?, url, platform, display_name}) — the agent's OWN brand socials
- personality (string, max 20000 chars) — full persona text
- default_user_voice ({voice_id, source}) — default TTS voice

Full-list replacement: `keywords`, `monitored`, `research_topics`, `target_platforms`, `linked_accounts`. To add one row without touching others, GET first, append, PATCH. Sending `keywords` without `monitored` auto-mirrors keywords into monitored with item_type='keyword'. `description` is hard-capped at 500 chars. Unknown fields return 422.

### Voice (Agent Core)
- GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/library?source={public|user_designed|user_trained|user_elevenlabs} — merged voice list
- GET/POST/DELETE /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/integrations/elevenlabs — connect/validate/disconnect the user's ElevenLabs API key
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/integrations/elevenlabs/test — validate a key without saving

Voice design (4-step prompt-based flow, hide provider from callers):
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/design/generate-script — step 1: get a read-aloud script
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/design/generate-description — step 2: get style descriptors (requires gender)
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/design/generate-samples — step 3: get 3 candidate `{generation_id, audio}`
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/design — step 4: finalize with `{generation_id, name}`

Voice cloning (sync):
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/clone — body: `{name, audio_url}` (preferred) OR `{name, audio_base64}` (small clips)

Voice delete + preview:
- DELETE /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/{voice_id} — delete user-owned voice
- POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/{voice_id}/preview — enqueue TTS preview job (ASYNC, returns `{user_job_id}`)
- GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/voice/preview/{job_id} — poll preview job status

Auth: PAT (`X-API-Key`) via `api.gen.pro`.

## Agentic Chat API

AI-powered content strategy with built-in research. The agent researches topics across
10+ platforms, analyzes trending content, and generates video ideas with full production
manifests and curated visual assets.

Base URL: https://agent.gen.pro/v1 (same PAT auth)

### Generate research-backed ideas
POST /v1/agent/run
Body: {"message": "generate 5 content ideas about celebrity skincare routines", "agent_id": "YOUR_AGENT_ID"}
Returns: {run_id, conversation_id, status: "running", firebase_path}
Poll GET /v1/agent/runs/{run_id} until status = "completed".

The agent automatically researches the topic, downloads and analyzes assets,
writes scripts that match the actual visual content, and verifies factual claims.

### Refine ideas
POST /v1/agent/run
Body: {"message": "make idea 1 punchier, change idea 3 to montage", "conversation_id": "CONV_ID", "agent_id": "YOUR_AGENT_ID"}

### Standalone research
POST /v1/research
Body: {"topic": "tariffs on beauty imports 2026", "depth": "default", "agent_id": "YOUR_AGENT_ID"}
Returns structured findings from Reddit, X, YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, HN, Perplexity, Gemini.

### Set persistent preferences
POST /v1/agent/run
Body: {"message": "remember: always use statement hooks, target women 25-34", "agent_id": "YOUR_AGENT_ID"}
Preferences apply to ALL future generations.

### List ideas
GET /v1/agent/ideas?agent_id={id}&status={status}
Status flow: generated → approve_to_create → ready_for_review → approved → published
PUT /v1/agent/ideas/{id}/status/{new_status}

### Content ideas response shape
Each idea includes: title, hook, full_script, video_type, estimated_duration,
selected_assets[] (url, type, description, usage, clip_range),
project_manifest (timeline_layers), inspiration_sources[], rationale

### Video type IDs
0=Any, 1=Talking Avatar, 2=Green Screen, 3=Montage, 4=Text-Driven,
5=POV Object, 6=Narrated/VO, 8=Split Screen, 9=Skit

## Integrations

- MCP Server: npx @poweredbygen/autocontentengine-mcp-server@latest
- TypeScript SDK: npm install @poweredbygen/autocontentengine-sdk
- n8n: Use HTTP Request node with X-API-Key header
- OpenAPI: https://api.gen.pro/openapi.yaml

## Error Format

{error: "Human-readable message", error_code: "machine_code"}

Common codes:
- 401 unauthorized — invalid or missing API key
- 403 forbidden — no permission for this resource
- 404 not_found — resource does not exist
- 422 usable_gen_credit_required — no active credits
- 422 agent_not_found — invalid agent_id
- 422 insufficient_credits_for_job — not enough credits for this generation
- 422 validation_error — invalid request body

## Optional

- [Full API Reference](https://api.gen.pro/llms-full.txt)
- [API Documentation](https://api.gen.pro)
- [Help Center](https://docs.gen.pro)
- [GEN Homepage](https://www.gen.pro)
